title: Aurora answer & citation evaluation rubric
unit_of_evaluation: one atomic claim within an answer, plus the answer as a whole
support_note: A claim is SUPPORTED by a passage when at least support_threshold of its content words appear in that passage. This deterministic lexical check catches off-evidence (hallucinated-topic) claims; subtle factual errors are left to the LLM judge.

metrics.groundedness: fraction of claims whose cited passage supports them
metrics.citation_validity: fraction of claims whose citation points to a supporting passage that is gold evidence for the query
metrics.completeness: fraction of the query's gold evidence chunks covered by a supported, correctly cited claim
metrics.task_success: the LLM judge's holistic pass/fail on whether the answer satisfies the query (residual judgement not captured by the deterministic checks)

judge.note: Deterministic, offline stand-in for an LLM judge. Scores are canned and keyed by input (variant + case), read from judge.json — no network. The judge prompt is built with the shared llm_core ChatMessage shape.
